privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How Caros collects, uses, and protects your information across bookings, inquiries, and support.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.body: We collect the details you submit when requesting a booking, sending an inquiry, contacting support, or communicating through WhatsApp. This may include your name, phone number, email address, booking preferences, and any message you choose to send.

usage.title: How We Use Information
usage.body: We use your information to respond to inquiries, manage reservations, coordinate delivery or pickup, provide support, improve the customer experience, and maintain service reliability and security.

sharing.title: When We Share Information
sharing.body: We only share information with service providers or operational partners when it is necessary to deliver the service you requested, process communication, meet legal obligations, or protect our business and customers.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: We retain customer and inquiry records only for as long as needed to fulfill the service, support ongoing business operations, resolve disputes, or satisfy legal and accounting obligations.

rights.title: Your Choices
rights.body: You may request access to your information, ask us to correct inaccurate details, or request deletion when legally permitted. Privacy-related requests can be sent to our support team.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: The basic terms that apply when using Caros websites, submitting inquiries, or requesting bookings and transport services.

services.title: Service Scope
services.body: Caros provides fleet browsing, booking inquiries, vehicle rental and sales support, and transport-related communication. Availability, pricing, and final approval remain subject to confirmation.

bookings.title: Bookings and Requests
bookings.body: Submitting a form or inquiry does not guarantee reservation acceptance. Bookings are confirmed only after availability, eligibility, pricing, and any required documents are reviewed.

pricing.title: Pricing and Availability
pricing.body: Vehicle listings, promotional pricing, and availability may change without notice. We work to keep inventory accurate, but temporary mismatches or delays can occur while updates are being processed.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.body: You agree not to misuse the website, interfere with its operation, submit false booking information, or use the service in a way that violates applicable law or the rights of others.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Caros is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from website use, booking delays, or third-party service interruptions, except where liability cannot be limited by law.
